name: Onion Blossom Dips
recipeIngredient: Bottled buttermilk dressing or ranch dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. For Creamy Salsa Dip, combine equal parts bottled buttermilk dressing or ranch dressing with an equal part of bottled mild salsa in a blender. Blend on high speed until smooth and refrigerate tightly covered for up to 2 weeks.
2. For Extra Hot and Spicy Onion Blossom Dip, mix equal parts Catalina dressing with half the amount of bottled extra hot salsa in a blender. Blend until smooth and refrigerate for up to 2 weeks.
3. For Chunky Onion Blossom Dip, stir together equal parts bottled mild salsa, an equal part of 1000 Island dressing, 2 tablespoons sweet pickle relish (with some juice), and a dash of Tabasco sauce. Refrigerate for up to 2 weeks.
4. For Blue Cheese Dip, combine crumbled blue cheese with half the amount of ranch dressing or buttermilk dressing and 1/2 teaspoon garlic salt or powder. Stir in 2 tablespoons mayo and refrigerate within 2 weeks.
